questionHtml:
What is the arrangement of subunits in a DNA nucleotide?

A.  sugar – base – phosphate

B.  sugar – phosphate – base

C.  phosphate – sugar – base

D.  sugar – phosphate – base – base – phosphate – sugar

meta.title: What is the arrangement of subunits in a DNA nucleotide? A. sugar – base – phosphate B. sugar – phosphate – base C. phosphate – sugar – base D. sugar – phosphate – base – base – ph
